_SETUP: 1. Export your IC-Light / compositing workflow from ComfyUI as API format JSON.
2. Paste it here, replacing everything below this _SETUP key.
3. In the LoadImage node for the guest photo: set 'image' to "__INPUT_IMAGE__"
4. In the LoadImage node for the background: set 'image' to "__BACKGROUND__"
(background value will be e.g. 'P-BG1' — map this to your actual background filename)
